Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I know we've put a lot on you guys, but that's over now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Don't worry, I've been preparing for this day. You won't be disappointed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'll follow whatever orders you give. You're the leader here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Heh, don't worry. I'm in perfect condition.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I almost feel sorry for our enemy. Well, just give me a chance and you'll see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I'm a power fighter that overwhelms my foes with my fists.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 9 25 25}...Or so you'd think, right? But that's definitely not all there is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I've been sharpening my skills as well, and that includes the ability to target an enemy's weakness. Just wait, you'll see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I'll make up for all that time I lost before you know it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Plus, I've gotta show my stuff as one of the veteran members. Just make sure to put me in the advance team.[n]{f 1 1}
